title: This is Alex Jones Biggest Insecurity
summary: A brief clip where Alex Jones discusses his biggest insecurity, which centers on his work ethic and concern that he doesn't effectively develop and present his ideas despite working constantly.

key_claims.claim: Alex Jones feels his biggest insecurity is being lazy and not properly working out and presenting his ideas
Jones believes he works too much which prevents him from doing a good job, yet feels compelled to work constantly
Jones acknowledges that when he stops to craft his ideas more carefully, they become more effective
